info.name: Chasma Bazar API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for Chasma Bazar Backend

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Classic Black Frame",
  "sku": "CBF-001",
  "type": "optical",
  "frameType": "{{frame_id}}",
  "userCategory": "Men",
  "description": "Classic and elegant black frame with premium acetate material",
  "price": 2999,
  "productDiscount": 10,
  "company": "{{company_id}}",
  "colors": [
    {
      "color": "Black",
      "hexCode": "#000000",
      "images": [
        {
          "type": "normal",
          "url": "https://example.com/black-front.jpg",
          "public_id": "black_front_123",
          "alt": "Black frame front view"
        },
        {
          "type": "3d",
          "url": "https://example.com/black-3d.jpg",
          "public_id": "black_3d_123",
          "alt": "Black frame 3D view"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "stock": 50,
  "specsType": "eyeglasses",
  "model": "Classic-001",
  "material": "Acetate",
  "weight": 25,
  "dimensions": {"height": 45, "width": 140, "depth": 145},
  "warranty": {"duration": 12, "durationType": "months", "description": "1 year manufacturer warranty"},
  "isFeatured": false,
  "tags": ["classic", "formal", "black", "acetate"],
  "ageGroup": "adults"
}

{
  "name": "Summer Sale 20%",
  "description": "20% discount for summer season",
  "discountType": "percentage",
  "discountValue": 20,
  "maxDiscount": 1000,
  "applicableOn": "global",
  "priority": 10,
  "canStackWithOther": false,
  "canStackWithPromo": true,
  "startDate": "2024-12-01T00:00:00Z",
  "endDate": "2024-12-31T23:59:59Z",
  "isActive": true,
  "isAutoApplied": false
}

{
  "name": "Ray-Ban 15% Off",
  "description": "15% off all Ray-Ban products",
  "discountType": "percentage",
  "discountValue": 15,
  "applicableOn": "company",
  "applicableCompanies": [
    "{{company_id}}"
  ],
  "priority": 15,
  "startDate": "2024-12-01T00:00:00Z",
  "endDate": "2024-12-31T23:59:59Z",
  "isActive": true
}

{
  "name": "Aviator Frames 10% Off",
  "description": "10% off all aviator frames",
  "discountType": "percentage",
  "discountValue": 10,
  "applicableOn": "frame",
  "applicableFrames": [
    "{{frame_id}}"

  "priority": 8,
  "startDate": "2024-12-01T00:00:00Z",
  "endDate": "2024-12-31T23:59:59Z",

}

{

  "discountValue": 500,
  "applicableOn": "product",
  "applicableProducts": [
    "{{product_id}}"
  ],
  "priority": 20,
  "startDate": "2024-12-01T00:00:00Z",
  "endDate": "2024-12-31T23:59:59Z",
  "isActive": true
}

{
